expectations.evidence: Output is a single index.html file with embedded CSS
Hero section at lines 496-502 with h1 'Creative & Professional Design' and CTA button
Three portfolio cards at lines 509-551 for EC site, corporate site, and mobile app
Contact form at lines 560-577 with name, email, and message fields
Media queries at lines 398-449 and 451-482 provide responsive design for tablets and mobile
Uses system fonts (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI) instead of Google Fonts
Uses emoji characters in card-image elements (🎨, 💼, 📱 at lines 512, 526, 540) as functional UI icons
